pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.4.2 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 17 and Spring Framework 6.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 17 as a baseline and uses Spring Framework 5, which is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the minimum runtime; compiling with Java 11 settings will fail or produce incompatible bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace thymeleaf-extras-springsecurity5 with thymeleaf-extras-springsecurity6 to match Spring Security 6 used in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 uses Spring Security 6, which is incompatible with the Spring Security 5 integration provided by the old artifact.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update MySQL connector artifact from mysql-connector-java to mysql-connector-j to use the new groupId and artifactId.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifactId mysql-connector-java is deprecated and may not be available or compatible with newer build tools/repositories; the new artifact is required for modern MySQL driver support.
